stemHtml: What are the approximate dimensions of a typical, fully developed Tropical Revolving Storm (TRS)?

options.a:
Diameter of the eye: 30 - 70 NM
Diameter of the whole TRS: 800 NM
options.b:
Diameter of the eye: 30 - 50 NM
Diameter of the whole TRS: 500 NM
options.c:
Diameter of the eye: 100 - 150 NM
Diameter of the whole TRS: 1200 NM
options.d:
Diameter of the eye: 10 - 20 NM
Diameter of the whole TRS: 270 NM
